data_flags: CRITICAL: Primary PDF reports not accessible - requires manual upload
Line-item data for P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow NOT EXTRACTED
Only macro-level data available: Revenue (2021-2023), Net profit (2021-2025), Total assets/equity (2024), Cash (2024)
Year 2020: no data available in accessible sources
Year 2022: operating loss of -5.51B (unusual for precious metals mining) - verify against primary document (possible IFRS revaluation, associated company losses, or asset impairment)
Balance sheet check 2024: total_liabilities (100) = total_assets (20600) - total_equity (20500) requires verification (may indicate incomplete data extraction)
Reporting form: IFRS consolidated (includes subsidiaries, part of Nordgold group)
Data from smart-lab are aggregated summaries, not parsed from primary financial statements
smart-lab tables contain ~40+ metrics but line-item detail not accessible via web fetch
Alternative sources (conomy.ru, audit-it.ru, investfunds.ru) do not expose tabular data to web fetch
2020 data from earlier search indicated potential losses (-102.5M in 2020 per RSBУ search result) but requires confirmation
